cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Andrew could have gone to the coffee shop. Let me start by listing out all the information given. First, Andrew woke up at 8am. The coffee shop was closed after 8pm. So the possible time window is from 8am to 8pm. Then we have several people who saw Andrew doing different things at different times: - Elizabeth saw him fixing a computer from 11am to 3pm. - Jennifer saw him buying a bike from 3pm to 4pm. - Anthony saw him buying cookies from 4pm to 6pm. - Betty saw him watching a movie from 6pm to 8pm. So, the key here is to find the times when Andrew wasn't accounted for. If he was doing something else with others, he couldn't be at the coffee shop then.
